headline: MSCI Announces Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Call Details
summary: NEW YORK, July 08, 2026--MSCI Inc. ("MSCI" or the "Company") (NYSE: MSCI) today announced that it will host a conference call, as previously scheduled, to review second quarter 2026 financial results on Tuesday, July 21, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The results for second quarter 2026 will be released pre-market on the same day. A copy of the earnings release and other related materials and a live webcast will be available on the events and presentation section of MSCI’s Investor Relations

headline: Is MSCI (MSCI) Expensive As ESG Expansion Draws Fresh Attention?
summary: MSCI (MSCI) is back in focus after Petra Funds Group announced a relationship that will integrate MSCI sustainability and climate datasets into Petra’s PeerView ESG reporting platform for private market managers. See our latest analysis for MSCI. The latest Petra ESG collaboration lands as MSCI’s share price trades at US$608.09, with recent momentum mixed, including a 7-day share price return of 8.58% but a 1-day decline of 0.97%. Multi year total shareholder returns have been positive,...

headline: MSCI (MSCI) Stock Looks Near Fair Value While Earnings Seem Rich
summary: MSCI stock has returned 29.7% over the past three years and sits near US$608. Its valuation checks point to a company that looks closer to fairly valued on intrinsic value estimates, while screening as expensive on market multiples. Over the last three years, MSCI’s 29.7% return suggests investors have already priced in a meaningful portion of the growth story. Recent moves to deepen climate and ESG data offerings, such as the planned First Street acquisition and partnerships like PeerView,...

headline: Raymond James Maintains Strong Buy on MSCI, Raises Price Target to $760
summary: Raymond James  analyst Patrick O'Shaughnessy   maintains MSCI (NYSE:MSCI) with a Strong Buy and raises the price target from $730 to $760.

headline: Is MSCI (MSCI) Turning Private-Market ESG Data Access Into Its Next Moat?
summary: On 7 July 2026, Petra Funds Group announced a relationship with MSCI that integrates MSCI’s sustainability, climate and ESG datasets into Petra’s PeerView ESG reporting service for private market managers. This collaboration opens access to institutional-grade ESG benchmarks and controversies data for mid-market private GPs, aligning their non-financial reporting with the reference points used by larger limited partners. Next, we’ll explore how MSCI’s expanded ESG data access for private...
